title: 2020 05 02 Things With Major Upside
html:
TL;DR

  • May 2020 17-year-old Yahir's forward-looking pandemic thesis: voice-command business systems, IoT/contact-tracing-driven surveillance, renewed scientific credibility post-COVID, and outsourcing limits forcing automation onshore.
  • Frames the analysis through historical analogy: "studying the Great Depression, ancient worlds after destruction, 1918 pandemic, Black Plague" — Yahir at 17 is reaching for cyclical time / civilizational-collapse-and-rebound frames before he encounters them in Marquez.
  • The voice-command bet ("Alexa, Google Home... programming for smart homes, integrating into business — restaurants, banks, schools") is structurally the same bet as Rankett 6 years later: visibility/access in the new interface layer. Wrong device, right thesis.
  • The IoT/contact-tracing surveillance prediction lands hard — China's Health Code system was rolled out the same year, and the broader post pandemic futures mass-surveillance shift played out across 2020–2022.
  • The limits to outsourcing → automation thesis with the "insert robots and automation" footnote is also the early form of the automate the boring thread that hardens into Yahir's mindless interface disruption catalog by 2024.

Core content

The doc is a 4-bullet brain in compressed form: voice command, IoT, science credibility, automation. Each bullet has the "more on this later" hook of someone who knows the entry isn't complete but wants to plant the flag now. Sits next to the March 30 watchlist and the April 23 Munger note as the third leg of Yahir's pandemic-era macro brain.

What's striking in retrospect: the AI/automation bullet is the only one Yahir actually executed against. He didn't build voice-command business tools, didn't profit from contact-tracing infrastructure, didn't ride pro-science sentiment. But the automation displacing repetitive interfaces thesis — that's the ai search optimization / ai visibility engine / Rankett thread, six years later. The teen analyst was right about the wave, even if he was wrong about the ride.

This note belongs in the same genre as 2020 04 23 go to diamond: the macro brain practicing while the survival brain pays bills. The bridge income pattern that hardens in 2025 Austin was already the operating mode in spring 2020 Grants Pass.

Stub notes

  • surveillance state — STUB (concept, recurring across pandemic-era docs)
  • mindless human interface disruption — already exists.

Connections

  • covid pandemic era — parent era
  • grants pass or — location
  • post pandemic future thinking — predictive-thesis cluster
  • yahir thesis ai search 2022 2026 — the AI-bet thread originates here
  • from fitness to software the brotein arc — automation thesis precursor
  • value investing — methodological neighbor
